narrative:
Fairborn 221 (precinct in Greene County) has 699 registered voters, with 65.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.1 percentage points.
